SNAKEBITE_FORM.description: 当你打出牌时，将其[gold]变化[/gold]为蛇咬
SNAKEBITE_FORM.title: 蛇咬形态
SNAKEBITE_STORM.description: 丢弃你的所有手牌，将等量的蛇咬加入你的手牌
SNAKEBITE_STORM.title: 蛇咬风暴
SNAKEBITE_DOWN.description: 当你打出蛇咬时，抽两张牌
SNAKEBITE_DOWN.title: 蛇咬下山
SNAKEBITE_UP.description: 所有队友抽{Cards:diff()}张牌，将抽上来的牌[gold]变化[/gold]为蛇咬
SNAKEBITE_UP.title: 抱蛇
SNAKEBITE_LANDING.description: 对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，用蛇咬填满所有队友的手牌
SNAKEBITE_LANDING.title: 蛇降
SNAKEBITE_TRAP.description: 免费打出弃牌堆中的所有蛇咬
SNAKEBITE_TRAP.title: 蛇咬陷阱
